children.heading: Law of salvage and law of finds
children.label: a Law of salvage and law of finds
children.text: The law of salvage and the law of finds shall not apply to abandoned shipwrecks to which applies.section 2105 of this title

children.heading: Laws of United States
children.label: b Laws of United States
children.text: This chapter shall not change the laws of the United States relating to shipwrecks, other than those to which this chapter applies.

children.heading: Effective date
children.label: c Effective date
children.text: This chapter shall not affect any legal proceeding brought prior to .April 28, 1988
